item.title: log
item.description: Wiki Log Append-only chronological record of all wiki operations. Grep tip: grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -10 → last 10 entries.

item.title: overview
item.description: Overview Master synthesis of the Royal Game of Ur codebase: architecture, features, and current state.

item.title: index
item.description: Wiki Index Last updated: 2026-04-14 Total pages: 26 Total sources ingested: GitHub repo (micho8cho93/ur) Overview overview — Master synthesis of the codebase, architecture reference, and navigation guide Architecture architecture — High-level three-layer design and data flow layer-frontend — Expo Ro...

item.title: expo-router
item.description: Expo Router (Screen Structure) File-based routing layout of the app — all screens, groups, and provider wrapping.

item.title: zustand-game-store
item.description: Zustand Game Store The single source of truth for all in-match runtime state. Bridges the game engine, transport layer, and UI.

item.title: nakama-service
item.description: NakamaService The singleton service class that manages Nakama auth sessions, the WebSocket, and token lifecycle.

item.title: ur-internals
item.description: ur-internals The admin web application for the Royal Game of Ur — a separate package used to manage the Nakama backend from a browser UI.

item.title: next-steps
item.description: Next Steps A living list of outstanding tasks, open questions, and planned work for the Royal Game of Ur codebase and this wiki.

item.title: decisions
item.description: Architectural Decisions Why the system is designed the way it is: key decisions, trade-offs, and constraints.

item.title: layer-frontend
item.description: Frontend Layer Expo + React Native client: screens, routing, state management, and service layer.
